creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #1)

The 2 dependent ports of py-django-rq are marked DEPRECATED and expired today (bug #245851, r 534886 and r534887).
- devel/py-django-rq-dashboard
- www/py-django-annotations

After that, I'll update this port to 2.3.2 (latest version) and mark py-dj22-django-rq DEPRECATED.
